budget.policy: Use this packet first. Expand only listed specs/code/evidence when phase or stale revision requires exact source.

task.title: ThinkCode query executor integration
task.summary: Use ThinkCode for ad hoc programmatic context creation, view validation, graph checks, and staged edits without making it CodeWiki's memory layer.

goal.outcome: CodeWiki can delegate bounded query/ETL and validation tasks to ThinkCode while preserving CodeWiki semantic write boundaries.
acceptance: ThinkCode role is documented in skills and runtime guidance.
At least one workflow uses ThinkCode for compact context creation or graph/view validation when available.
Fallback path works when ThinkCode is unavailable.
ThinkCode writes remain staged or flow through CodeWiki capabilities/transactions.
non_goals: Let ThinkCode edit generated views directly.

delta.desired: ThinkCode acts as a policy-bound programmatic context and validation executor.
delta.current: ThinkCode is documented as future runtime support but not integrated into view/context workflows.
delta.closure: Integration seam and first use case are implemented with fallback.

specs.title: CodeWiki v2 Operating Model
specs.summary: Agreed v2 model for canonical truth, views, memory use, subagents, heartbeat, optional runtime tools, and sanitation.

specs.title: Runtime Policy
specs.summary: Policy boundary for codewiki runtime access in codewiki.

evidence.summary: Integrated optional ThinkCode context executor seam into heartbeat workflow: heartbeat now returns a bounded think_code_run script plan for view/task/graph context with native CodeWiki gateway/state fallback. Documented optional role and staged-write boundary in runtime/skills/README.
